channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #95: Too Cool For Pizza?
item.description:
How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth?
He ate the pizza before it was cool.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260525-1627.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth?
item.dadjokefix:punchline: He ate the pizza before it was cool.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth? He ate the pizza before it was cool. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjokefix #dadjoke #dadjokes #syntheticmedia #aicontent #cheesyjokes #wordplay #shortcomedy #fyp #pizza #hipster #food
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth?
He ate the pizza before it was cool. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.
🤖 Hank is an AI character. Voice, face and animation are all generated. . . . #dadjokefix #dadjoke #dadjokes #syntheticmedia #aicontent #cheesyjokes #wordplay #shortcomedy #fyp #pizza #hipster #food
item.dadjokefix:youtube_caption:
How did the hipster burn the roof of his mouth?
He ate the pizza before it was cool.
---

item.dadjokefix:youtube_title: Monday Morning Groans #95: Too Cool For Pizza?

item.title: Sunday Funday #94: That's gotta sting!
item.description:
I have the heart of a lion...
and a lifetime ban from the San Diego Zoo.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260524-2311.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: and a lifetime ban from the San Diego Zoo.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:

🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjokefix #dadjokes #dadjoke #aigenerated #syntheticmedia #groanworthy #cleancomedy #lol #foryou #zoo #lions #animals

item.title: Sunday Funday #93: Nutty situation on the street!
item.description:
Two peanuts were walking down the street.
One was a salted.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260524-1927.mp4

item.title: Sunday Funday #92: Big Cat Cheater?
item.description:
Why was the big cat disqualified from the race?
Because it was a cheetah.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260524-1511.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #91: Stop Singing, I Beg You!
item.description:
I thought my wife was joking when she said she'd leave me if I didn't stop signing "I'm A Believer"...
Then I saw her face.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260523-2307.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #90: What Song Do Bees Sing?
item.description:
Ever wondered why bees hum?
It's because they don't know the words.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260523-1508.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #89: Did I listen to my boss?
item.description:
My boss told me to have a good day.
So I went home...
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260522-2317.mp4

item.title: Joke Court Friday #88: Bees With a Hair Problem?
item.description:
Why do bees have sticky hair?
Because they use honey combs!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Joke Court Friday #87: DIY Disaster!
item.description:
I considered building the patio by myself.
But I didn't have the stones.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260522-1631.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Throwback Thursday #86: A Donation for the Pool?
item.description:
Today a man knocked on my door and asked for a small donation towards the local swimming pool.
I gave him a glass of water.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260521-2315.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: I gave him a glass of water.

item.title: Throwback Thursday #85: Ship Collision in the Caribbean!
item.description:
A red and a blue ship have just collided in the Caribbean.
Apparently the survivors are marooned.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260521-2005.mp4

item.title: Throwback Thursday #84: Scared of Elevators!
item.description:
I am terrified of elevators.
I’m going to start taking steps to avoid them.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260521-1641.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #83: Alien Lullaby
item.description:
How do you get a baby alien to sleep?
You rocket.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
